questions.question: What attribute on <script setup> enables generic type parameters in Vue 3.3+?
How does TypeScript infer the type T when using a generic component?
options: You must explicitly specify T using the component's generic prop
T is inferred from the runtime value passed to the first prop
T is inferred from the types of props like items at the call site
T defaults to unknown unless you annotate the parent component

questions.question: How did you implement generic components in Vue before the generic attribute (pre-3.3)?
options: Using a special @generic decorator on the component class
Wrapping defineComponent in a factory function with a type parameter
Using the type: 'generic' option in defineComponent
Adding a generics section to the component's <docs> block
